name: Looking for a React component for panning & zooming : r/reactjs
snippet: I've got an SVG (rendered by React) and I want to add pan/zoom to it. Preferably as close as possible to how Google Maps works.

name: react-svg-pan-zoom: Problem with production version (serve build)
snippet: I'm using react-svg-pan-zoom component from an application created using create-react-app, everything works fine as long as I do not build.

name: react-svg-pan-zoom - NPM
snippet: react-svg-pan-zoom is a React component that adds pan and zoom features to the SVG images. It helps to display big SVG images in a small space.

name: bumbu/svg-pan-zoom: JavaScript library that enables  - GitHub
snippet: JavaScript library that enables panning and zooming of an SVG in an HTML document, with mouse events or custom JavaScript hooks - bumbu/svg-pan-zoom.

name: Adding zoom, pan, and pinch to your React web apps
snippet: In this article, we'll explore a few libraries that you can use in your React applications to add zoom, pan, and pinch functionalities to HTML elements.
